title: Halos
wikitext:
[]: Halos             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Mar 05, 2008 5:03 pm --

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Mar 05, 2008 7:25 pm I'm not sure I'd take Halos and Rainbows in the same category. Rainbows are one thing, Halos are another. Halos around Armisael-Rei and Rebuild-Sachi are not in the same category as the optical rainbows/halations seen with Sachi and Zer or the rainbow halation for Ramiel(Original Ramiel has a rainbow halation appear just for a second. Really, yes. It's not a Rebuild addition.)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 10:10 pm Yep, just like I always thought, halos are for ATF flight.
